site.title: Rare Cancer Info Hub
site.tagline: Hard-to-find information, gathered in one place - for cancers too rare to research alone.
site.about: Started by a patient diagnosed with extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (EMC) at 29 who found almost nothing useful online. Each cancer page pulls together every study, pooled outcomes, a tool to filter outcomes by your own details, support groups, centres of excellence, a specialist finder, treatment and monitoring frameworks, and questions to ask your oncologist.

cancers.name: Extraskeletal Myxoid Chondrosarcoma
cancers.summary: A rare soft-tissue sarcoma (~1-3% of sarcomas) driven by NR4A3 gene fusions; usually slow-growing but recurs/spreads late.
